nasb.text: Their drink offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bull and a third of a hin for the ram and a fourth of a hin for a lamb; this is the burnt offering of each month throughout the months of the year.

esv.text: Their drink offerings shall be half a hin of wine for a bull, a third of a hin for a ram, and a quarter of a hin for a lamb. This is the burnt offering of each month throughout the months of the year.

cnv.text: 每頭公牛要獻酒兩公升作奠祭，每隻公綿羊獻酒一公升半，每隻公羊羔獻酒一公升。這是每月當獻的燔祭，一年之中每個月都要這樣。

ccb.text: 献燔祭时要同时献上奠祭，每头公牛需献二升奠酒，每只公绵羊需献一点二升奠酒，每只羊羔需献一升奠酒。这是朔日要献的燔祭，一年之中月月如此。
